sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى عَلَى مَوَاقِعِ التَّوَاصُلِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيِّ يَمْلِكُونَ تَأْثِيرًا بَالِغًا عَلَى قَرَارَاتِ الشَّبَابِ الشِّرَائِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Stvaraoci sadržaja na društvenim mrežama postali su veoma utjecajni na kupovne odluke mladih.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators on social media have become highly influential over the purchasing decisions of young people.

sentences.arabic: وَرَغْمَ أَنَّ بَعْضَهُمْ يُقَدِّمُ نَصَائِحَ قَيِّمَةً، إِلَّا أَنَّ الْبَعْضَ الْآخَرَ يَهْتَمُّ فَقَطْ بِالرِّبْحِ الْمَادِيِّ السَّرِيعِ.
sentences.translation: Iako neki od njih pružaju vrijedne savjete, drugi su zainteresovani samo za brzu materijalnu dobit.
sentences.translationEn: Although some of them provide valuable advice, others are only interested in quick material profit.

sentences.arabic: مِنْ الضَّرُورِيِّ أَنْ يَتَحَلَّى الْمُتَابِعُونَ بِفِكْرٍ نَقْدِيٍّ لِتَمْيِيزِ الْإِعْلَانَاتِ الْمُمَوَّلَةِ عَنْ التَّجَارِبِ الْحَقِيقِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Neophodno je da pratioci posjeduju kritičko razmišljanje kako bi razlikovali plaćene oglase od stvarnih iskustava.
sentences.translationEn: It is essential for followers to have critical thinking to distinguish sponsored ads from real experiences.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمِصْدَاقِيَّةُ هِيَ الْعُمْلَةُ الْأَسَاسِيَّةُ الَّتِي تَبْنِي جُسُورَ الثِّقَةِ بَيْنَ الْمُؤَثِّرِ وَجُمْهُورِهِ.
sentences.translation: Vjerodostojnost je osnovna valuta koja gradi mostove povjerenja između influensera i njegove publike.
sentences.translationEn: Credibility is the primary currency that builds bridges of trust between the influencer and their audience.
